parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $json.title, event_date: $json.event_date, event_time: $json.event_time || null, city: $json.city || 'Lisbon', description: $json.description || '', category: $json.category || 'social', source: $json.source || 'Scraped', url: $json.url || '', status: $json.status || 'pending', price: $json.price || 'Free' }) }}
